name: OpenSCAD Integration
description: Import OpenSCAD (.scad) files, edit parameters via a visual form, and export as STL or 3MF. Requires OpenSCAD installed on the server or the optional Docker container.
author: MeshSilo

settings.label: OpenSCAD Binary Path
settings.description: Path to the OpenSCAD binary. Use 'openscad' if it's in PATH, or a full path like /usr/bin/openscad.

settings.label: Use Docker Container
settings.description: Execute OpenSCAD via the meshsilo-openscad Docker container instead of a local binary.

settings.label: Docker Container Name
settings.description: Name of the OpenSCAD Docker container (only used when Docker mode is enabled).

settings.label: Default Export Format
settings.description: Default output format when rendering OpenSCAD files.

settings.label: Render Timeout (seconds)
settings.description: Maximum time allowed for an OpenSCAD render before it is killed.
